summary: Enthusiastic hidden‑gem set featuring Big Boss Man, Iko Iko and In The Midnight Hour; recording quality not detailed but fans rave.
review: All three reviewers gush about the discovery of this mysterious New Year's Eve performance, calling it a “frickin awesome” hidden gem. While no technical details are given, the excitement over songs like Big Boss Man, Iko Iko and In The Midnight Hour suggests the show is well‑received despite the unknown recording source.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent 5‑star reviews praising the performance indicate a very positive reception; lack of technical commentary limits precision but consensus is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers mentioned sound quality, clarity, or source type.
